title: Farmers' participatory management of diseases for higher yield and nutritive value of crop residues of groundnut, Deccan Plateau, India
abstract:
The objectives of this workshop, Farmers' participatory management of diseases
for higher yield and nutritive value of crop residues of groundnut, Deccan Plateau,
India, are to critically review the results of the studies conducted over the last two
years and ascertain how to make best use of the findings. Held at the Agricultural
Research Station (ARS), Acharya NG Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) ,
Anantapur, Andhra Pradesh, the workshop was sponsored by ICRISAT, the
International Livestock Research Institute (ILRI), ANGRAU, and funded by the
Department for International Development (DFID) , UK.
